findings.title: theme-btn click listener accumulates on every navigation
findings.current: addEventListener('click') called in setThemeFeature() on every astro:after-swap with no removal
findings.expected: removeEventListener before re-adding, or use AbortController

findings.title: astro:after-swap scroll-to-top listener added unboundedly by data-astro-rerun script
findings.current: document.addEventListener('astro:after-swap') inside data-astro-rerun — new listener every navigation
findings.expected: Move to regular script block or guard against duplicates

findings.title: Scroll progress listener accumulates on every navigation in PostDetails
findings.current: updateScrollProgress() registers new scroll listener each data-astro-rerun execution
findings.expected: Use AbortController or guard flag to prevent duplicates

findings.title: BackToTopButton scroll listener accumulates on every navigation
findings.current: backToTop() registers scroll listener in data-astro-rerun with no cleanup

findings.title: BackToTopButton click listener may stack on persistent elements
findings.current: click listener added each data-astro-rerun — benign if element replaced, harmful if persisted

findings.title: graph.astro body overflow:hidden leaks into other pages after navigation
findings.current: :global(body) { overflow: hidden } — no cleanup on navigation away
findings.expected: Apply via JS effect with cleanup, or add astro:before-swap cleanup

findings.title: GraphView cleanup effect calls graph.clear() on externally-owned graph instance
findings.current: if (graph) graph.clear() — clears shared graph from GlobalGraphPage
findings.expected: Only clear if internally created: if (graph && !hasExternalData) graph.clear()

findings.title: Layout data-astro-rerun script overwrites window.theme, discarding theme.ts extensions
findings.current: window.theme = { ... } unconditionally replaces on every navigation

findings.title: PostDetails progress bar duplicated on every navigation — no guard
findings.current: createProgressBar() appends new div each data-astro-rerun execution

findings.title: ThemeObserver rAF not cancelled on unmount — races with rapid navigation
findings.current: requestAnimationFrame(updateColors) — if unmount before rAF fires, updateColors hits dead sigma
